violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The insides of the microwave, reach-in freezer, and refrigerated prep table were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Diced peppers in the refrigerated prep table near the flat top grill were found not dated. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked when held for more than 24 hours.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of upright freezer in the back room and the refrigerated prep table were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean utensils were found in dirty containers on the shelving unit in the kitchen. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location, where they will be protected from contamination.

Laundering of linens. — --Laundry equipment was not located in area separated from exposed food or from exposed clean equipment/utensil. Dirty aprons were found stored on the shelving unit in the kitchen used for storing clean equipment and utensils. Dirty linens should be stored separated from clean linens and equipment.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Tiles on the wall behind the refrigerated prep table were found missing during inspection. These should be replaced and maintained in good repair.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee food items were found in the reach-in cooler in the kitchen as well as on top of the microwave. Personal items should be stored separated from food items used in the facility.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
